testing.title: Test prompt
testing.uploadDescription: Upload a JSON, CSV, TXT, or MD file.
testing.mappingDescription: Map the fields from the file to prompt variables.
testing.noVariablesHint: Define placeholders using double curly braces.

testing.errorInvalidName: Only letters, numbers, and underscores allowed

variables.errorInvalidName: Only letters, numbers, and underscores allowed

authenticity.title: Fake/Real

comparison.description: Directly compare and rate two AI models

ranking.pageSubtitle: Open a case and sort the features by quality.

rating.pageSubtitle: Open a case and rate the individual features.

historyRating.pageSubtitle: Open a thread and rate coherence, quality and overall impact.

authenticity.pageSubtitle: Open a thread and vote whether it is real or fake.

comparison.pageSubtitle: Select a persona to enter the comparison chat.
comparison.emptyHint: No comparison sessions have been created yet.

overview.title: Chatbot Arena
overview.subtitle: Manage and monitor LLM judge sessions.

positionSwap.label: Position swap
positionSwap.description: Swap A/B positions to reduce order bias.

workers.label: Workers: {count}
workers.speedHint: More workers = faster evaluation (up to {count} parallel).

pillarSample.title: Pillar sample
pillarSample.description: Sample a fixed number of comparisons per pillar pair.

roundRobin.title: Round robin
roundRobin.description: Compare every thread against all others within selected pillars.

freeForAll.title: Free for all
freeForAll.description: Compare all threads across selected pillars.

calculation.title: Calculation
calculation.durationHint: Estimated per worker based on average comparison time.

noThreads.title: No threads available
noThreads.body: Use <link>Chatbot Arena</link> to sync KIA data.

matrix.title: Comparison matrix
matrix.legend: Row = attacker, column = defender. Values = number of wins.

likertStability.title: Likert score stability during position swap
likertStability.tooltip: Measures how much Likert scores change for the same thread when its position (A↔B) is swapped. Lower deltas = more stable. (Auto-J calibration)

legacy.title: Position swap consistency
legacy.alert: {consistent} of {total} swap pairs showed consistent results (same winner regardless of A/B position).

alert.warningText: The LLM shows a strong verbosity bias; longer threads are preferred.
alert.infoText: The LLM prefers shorter threads; possible negative verbosity bias.
alert.okText: No significant preference for thread length detected.

anonymization.title: Anonymization
anonymization.subtitle: Offline pseudonymization for German texts (DOCX/PDF/Clipboard)

tooltip.title: Anonymization
tooltip.line1: First load can take a moment until local models and the database are ready.
tooltip.line2: Offline: rules + NER detect personal data, then hits are pseudonymized consistently.
tooltip.line3: LLM/Hybrid: additional LLM extraction, results are then pseudonymized as well.

settings.title: Settings

engine.label: Engine
engine.warning: Text is sent to the configured LLM (LiteLLM/OpenAI). No offline guarantee.

settings.nameCountHint: Affects auto-replacements when recalculating or when new input arrives.

messages.llmMissingApiKey: LLM is not configured (OPENAI_API_KEY or LITELLM_API_KEY missing).
messages.clipboardCopyFailed: Could not copy output to clipboard.

anonymization.exampleText:
Hello Ms. Miller,

my name is Anna Miller (34) and I live in 8001 Zurich.
Please contact me at 079 123 45 67 or via anna.mueller@example.ch.
My AHV number is 756.1234.5678.97.
The appointment is on 12.03.2024 at 14:30 at the University of Zurich.

Best regards
Anna Miller

sidebar.title: AI Assistant

welcome.greeting: Hi! I'm your AI writing assistant.

sidebar.footerTip: Tip: Use @@-commands in the editor for quick actions.

commandDescriptions.ai: Ask anything or give an instruction.
commandDescriptions.rewrite: Rewrite the selected text in a more academic style.
commandDescriptions.expand: Expand the selected text with more detail.
commandDescriptions.cite: Find suitable sources for the statement.
commandDescriptions.abstract: Generate an abstract for the document.

rollback.title: Discard changes?
rollback.forceConfirm: This will discard local changes for {path}. Continue?
rollback.simpleConfirm: All uncommitted changes will be discarded and the document will reset to the last commit.
